projects.name: openclaw
projects.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
projects.summary_zh: 生产级多渠道个人AI助手 | 跨平台高扩展
projects.summary_en: Production-grade multi-channel personal AI assistant | Cross-platform extensibility
projects.recommendation_zh: 强烈推荐自托管AI助理，插件生态丰富
projects.recommendation_en: Highly recommended for self-hosted AI with rich plugin ecosystem
highlights_zh: 插件SDK覆盖20+消息平台，支持扩展
多阶段Docker + 沙箱安全构建
concerns_zh: 构建时混用Bun与pnpm，需注意环境一致性
concerns_en: Mixed Bun/pnpm usage in build may require env consistency

projects.name: nullclaw
projects.description: Fastest, smallest, and fully autonomous AI assistant infrastructure written in Zig
projects.summary_zh: 极致轻量全自主Zig AI助手基础设施 | 可持续边缘基石
projects.summary_en: Ultra-lightweight fully autonomous Zig AI assistant infrastructure | Sustainable edge foundation
projects.recommendation_zh: 边缘设备与资源受限场景首选
projects.recommendation_en: Preferred for edge devices and resource-constrained scenarios
highlights_zh: vtable全模块可插拔、3230+测试、多架构CI/CD
highlights_en: Full vtable pluggability, 3230+ tests, multi-arch CI/CD

projects.name: zeroclaw
projects.description: Fast, small, and fully autonomous AI assistant infrastructure — deploy anywhere, swap anything 🦀
projects.summary_zh: 轻量高性能Rust AI代理运行时 | 零开销可移植
projects.summary_en: Lightweight high-performance Rust AI agent runtime | Zero-overhead portable
projects.recommendation_zh: 理想边缘部署与插件化AI助手选择
projects.recommendation_en: Ideal for edge deployment and pluggable AI assistants
concerns_en: Repeated README warnings on impersonation forks

projects.name: microclaw
projects.description: 🦀An agentic AI assistant that lives in your chats, inspired by nanoclaw and incorporating some of its design ideas. Built with Rust 🦀
projects.summary_zh: Rust 生产级多渠道 AI 代理 | 高可扩展基线
projects.summary_en: Rust production-grade multi-channel AI agent | High extensibility baseline
projects.recommendation_zh: 强烈推荐多平台 AI 助手部署
projects.recommendation_en: Strongly recommended for multi-platform AI assistant deployment
highlights_zh: 模块化 crate 架构与平台适配器
CI 多 OS + nightly 稳定性门控
highlights_en: Modular crate architecture with platform adapters
concerns_zh: 活跃开发中（v0.0.163），特性可能变更

projects.name: atomicbot
projects.description: The Fastest Way to Run OpenClaw 🦞
projects.summary_zh: 生产级多渠道AI网关 | 插件沙箱高扩展框架
projects.summary_en: Production-grade multi-channel AI gateway | Extensible plugin sandbox framework
projects.recommendation_zh: 推荐自托管跨平台AI个人助理部署
projects.recommendation_en: Recommended for self-hosted cross-platform AI assistants
highlights_zh: Docker多阶段沙箱+可复现SHA构建
highlights_en: Plugin SDK for 20+ messaging platforms with opt-in extensions
Multi-stage Docker sandboxes with reproducible SHA builds
concerns_zh: TS核心+Python技能混合增加复杂度
concerns_en: Hybrid TS core + Python skills increases complexity
A2UI cross-arch build requires fallback stub

projects.name: nanoclaw
projects.description: A lightweight alternative to OpenClaw that runs in containers for security. Connects to WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, Gmail and other messaging apps,, has memory, scheduled jobs, and runs directly on Anthropic's Agents SDK
projects.summary_zh: 轻量容器化 Claude 助手 | AI 原生定制基线
projects.summary_en: Lightweight containerized Claude assistant | AI-native customization baseline
projects.recommendation_zh: 个人用户首选：容器隔离+AI 代码自改
projects.recommendation_en: Top pick for individuals: container isolation + AI code self-modification
highlights_zh: 极简依赖+TS 严格检查
技能漂移 CI 自动修复
concerns_zh: 依赖 Claude Code CLI 启动
concerns_en: Requires Claude Code CLI for setup

projects.name: pi-mono
projects.description: AI agent toolkit: coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI & web UI libraries, Slack bot, vLLM pods
projects.summary_zh: 生产级AI代理工具包 | 多平台LLM与扩展基线
projects.summary_en: Production-grade AI agent toolkit | Multi-platform LLM & extensibility baseline
projects.recommendation_zh: 推荐用于构建生产级AI编码助手
projects.recommendation_en: Recommended for production AI coding agents
highlights_zh: Biome+TS严格检查与多平台二进制构建
模块化包+扩展示例（自定义provider）
highlights_en: Biome+TS strict linting and multi-platform binaries
Modular packages with custom provider examples
concerns_zh: 构建脚本为顺序cd执行，缺少Turbo等缓存优化
concerns_en: Build script uses sequential cd without caching (e.g. Turbo)

projects.name: gptme
projects.description: Your agent in your terminal, equipped with local tools: writes code, uses the terminal, browses the web. Make your own persistent autonomous agent on top!
projects.summary_zh: 生产级终端AI代理 | 插件化高扩展
projects.summary_en: Production terminal AI agent | Plugin-extensible

projects.name: zeptoclaw

projects.name: cli
projects.description: Entire is a new developer platform that hooks into your git workflow to capture AI agent sessions on every push, unifying your code with its context and reasoning.

projects.name: llama-terminal-completion
projects.description: AI terminal assistant for any OpenAI-compatible API. Features interactive chat TUI, command generation, code explanation, and streaming responses. Works with Ollama, OpenAI, LM Studio, and more.

projects.name: safeclaw
projects.description: Safeclaw is the alternative to openclaw.. You can naturally chat with it via text and voice, yet there is no language model., it picks up on intent and semantics. No prompt injection while you get over ninety percent of what openclaw does plus tts and voice to text

projects.name: zcf
projects.description: Zero-Config Code Flow for Claude code & Codex

projects.name: moltis
projects.description: A Rust-native claw you can trust. One binary — sandboxed, secure, auditable. Voice, memory, MCP tools, and multi-channel access built-in.
projects.summary_zh: 生产级 Rust 单二进制安全爪 | 零 unsafe + 沙箱优先
projects.summary_en: Production-grade Rust single-binary secure claw | Zero unsafe + sandbox-first
projects.recommendation_zh: 强烈推荐自托管审计型 AI 代理
projects.recommendation_en: Strongly recommended for auditable self-hosted AI agents

CI 含 clippy/fmt/zizmor/E2E + CodSpeed 基准 + changelog guard
highlights_en: CI with clippy/fmt/zizmor/E2E + CodSpeed + changelog guard
concerns_zh: Docker 沙箱需挂载宿主 socket（非纯 Rust 隔离）
concerns_en: Docker sandbox requires host socket mount (not pure Rust isolation)

projects.name: openfang
projects.description: Open-source Agent Operating System

projects.recommendation_en: Ideal for self-hosted agents; pin commit pre-v1.0

highlights_en: 1767+ tests + zero Clippy + full security audit
14 modular crates + WASM sandbox + cross-platform single binary
